## What changed

## Why it matters

## Evidence

Link the issue and include public examples or design evidence.

## Test result

List exact commands and results. Do not claim tests passed unless they were run.

## Screenshots or logs

Include when applicable, with secrets, personal data, and local paths removed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and explained.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `npm test` passes, or failures are documented above.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
- [ ] New or changed configuration is explained.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, webhooks, cookies, personal data, or private repository content are included.
- [ ] Generated files are included only when relevant.
